ddls:
CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "datetime" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the market */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the market */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the market */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the market */,
  "volume" REAL /* Trading volume for the given time period */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price for the given time period */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., stock exchange, commodities market, cryptocurrency exchange) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the specific data source */,
  "open_interest" REAL /* Total number of outstanding derivative contracts (e.g., futures, options) that have not been settled */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data point */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the data was collected */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the market (e.g., stock ticker, commodity symbol) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_symbol FOREIGN KEY ("symbol") REFERENCES symbols ("symbol")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the exchange */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the exchange */,
  "trading_hours_start" TEXT /* Start time of the trading session */,
  "trading_hours_end" TEXT /* End time of the trading session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the exchange (e.g., open, closed, maintenance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the exchange information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "symbols" (
  "symbol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each symbol */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol (e.g., stock ticker, commodity symbol) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the symbol */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the exchange where the symbol is traded */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., stock, commodity, currency, cryptocurrency) */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the stock */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is denominated */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the symbol information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("symbol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_symbols_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., stock exchange, API, feed) */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL or endpoint of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's creation */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_mapping" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user-role mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
